name: SPU admissions source-backed gold evaluation
description: Copy this file to eval_dataset.gold.json after approved source documents are available. Do not fill ground-truth answers from memory or model output.

items.question: Replace with an English admissions question from an approved source.
items.ground_truth_answer: Replace with a human-reviewed answer copied or summarized from approved source documents.

items.question: استبدل هذا السؤال بسؤال قبول عربي من مصدر معتمد.
items.ground_truth_answer: استبدل هذا النص بإجابة راجعها إنسان اعتمادا على وثائق رسمية معتمدة.
